artPrompt: An ongoing arcane scene of an open ordinance binder whose pages spiral inward into an impossible recursive tunnel, each page reflecting the one before, glowing cyan footnote-arrows curving endlessly back on themselves into infinity. A single illegible smudged paragraph repeats down the receding throat of the spiral, paper edges curling in cold fluorescent light, vertiginous and hypnotic, rendered as a bold painted graphic-novel splash — strong silhouettes, heavy directional inking and dramatic shadow shapes, fully painted (not flat cel comic).
name: Pursuant to Subsection (c) of Subsection (c) of Subsection (c)
text:
Whereas, pursuant to this ordinance, the reader shall refer to subsection (c). Subsection (c) reads: "refer to subsection (c)." Repeat this step. There is no end to this step.
Notwithstanding the foregoing, and the foregoing's foregoing, all things at the table are hereby deemed compliant, noncompliant, and exempt, simultaneously, as both players, at once.
The regulation regulates itself into being. It is become law. The law do be looping.
